entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A major staple crop targeted for biofortification to combat micronutrient malnutrition

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A global health challenge caused by dietary deficiencies, prevalent in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country with the largest number of malnourished people globally

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the micronutrient concentration in crops

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: Grain iron concentration, quantitatively inherited and influenced by non-additive gene actions

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: Grain zinc concentration, quantitatively inherited and predominantly under additive gene control

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating accessions and breeding lines to identify promising donors

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE CONTROL
entities.description: A genetic mechanism predominantly controlling grain zinc concentration

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENE ACTIONS
entities.description: Genetic mechanisms that play a role in controlling grain iron concentration

entities.name: MID-PARENTAL VALUE
entities.description: A method used to predict the performance of F1 hybrids for specific traits

entities.name: RIL POPULATION
entities.description: Recombinant Inbred Line population used for genetic mapping

entities.name: GENETIC MAP
entities.description: A representation of gene loci on a chromosome, constructed using markers

entities.name: MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers used to construct a genetic map

entities.name: DARTS
entities.description: Diversity Arrays Technology markers used in genetic mapping

entities.name: DARTSEQS
entities.description: DArTseq markers used in genetic mapping

entities.name: SSRS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used in genetic mapping

entities.name: QTLS
